metadata.description: The /dec slash command (declarative reframing, pairs with /goal) — Traditional Chinese (Taiwan) localization

plugins.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
plugins.description: The /dec slash command — reframes an imperative request as a contract (success criteria + verification command + non-goals + a ready-to-use /goal condition). Pairs with Claude Code's built-in /goal (v2.1.139+) to form the user-side leverage pipeline Karpathy described. Includes a CLAUDE.md you can adopt separately via README install options. Traditional Chinese (Taiwan) localization fork of forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills.
